features: 【Package includes】: You will receive 4 pcs esatin hair bands. Diameter outside: approx. 6 cm/2.36inch, inside: approx. 4.5cm/1.77inch, multicolors of silk scrunchie set offer more styles makeup and hair styling.
【High-quality Satin】:Satin hair scrunchies uses high-quality satin, feels comfortable and smooth, saturated colors, stylish and elegant.
【Rich color choice】: 4 colors combination, each color allows you to create a different appearance every day, it can also be used as an accessory to wear on the wrist.
【Design】: The rubber bands inside are stretchable with good elastic, soft to wear, fix your hair well and won't hurt it.
【Wide application】：Our satin scrunchies curly hair can be widely used in various hairstyles, such as curly hair, straight hair or clean high ponytail, and you can match any clothes and occasions.
description: Product Description Features 1.4 colors of the hair band, you can match different colors according to your daily clothes and hairstyle. 2.Not too big or too small, will not break easily and will hold the hair firmly and will not slip. 3.Every day you can create different looks with different colors and make you a fashionista. 4.Thin silk scrunchie made of high-quality satin, stretchable, good elasticity, tightly tied to the hair, you will find that there are no wrinkles, wrinkles on the hair, and no tightness. 5.Satin Elastic Ties Hair Bands Suitable for daily wear and different occasions such as party, ceremony, office, school, travel, etc. 6.Silk hair ties are suitable for curly hair, straight hair, ponytails, bun heads, and thick or thin hair. Product Information Size: About 4.5cm/1.77inch in diameter Color: 4 different colors Material: high-quality satin Package Includes: 4 x Silk satin hair tie
